mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name as category_name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (title, description, price, stock, category_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{categoryId})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET title=#{title}, price=#{price}, stock=#{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
